document.title: Process Quality Control Plan (QC 공정도)
document.documentType: Q.C 공정도 / Process Quality Control Plan

sourceSummary.oneLine: QC process control plan A-PQCP-5-002 for F1417MCW, A1417MCW, and A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines manufacturing and outgoing inspection process controls, inspection items, acceptance criteria, inspection frequency, sample quantity, equipment/JIG, responsible functions, control methods, and records.
keyPoints: Document No. A-PQCP-5-002 is identified as a Process Quality Control Plan.
The plan applies to Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models F1417MCW, A1417MCW, and A1717MCW.
REV is listed as 00, with enactment date 12/2/22 and revised date marked as '-'.
Inspection frequency is generally 매LOT with 전수 sample quantity for listed manufacturing and outgoing inspection steps.
Critical-to-quality items are marked CTQ for processes including Laser Scribe, OLB, PB, OLB 압흔 검사, Assembly #1, Final Test, and PB Contact resistance measurement.

evidence.claim: IQC covers manufacturing incoming inspection for panels and quality incoming inspection for mechanical parts, PBA, and accessories.
evidence.evidenceText:
- 제조 수입검사
 · Panel 검사
- 품질 수입검사
 · 기구류, PBA, 악세사리류 등

evidence.claim: Laser Scribe is identified as a CTQ process with inspection items Broken, Crack, Chipping, and 직진도.
evidence.evidenceText: 3,- Laser Scribe...- Panel 외관 상태,"- Broken, Crack, Chipping, 직진도",CTQ

evidence.claim: OLB and PB bonding inspection criteria include no lifting or folding and X/Y axis misalignment tolerance of ±0.5 mm.
evidence.evidenceText:
- 들뜸, 접힘 없을 것
- Bonding 부위 이상 도포될 것
- X, Y축 틀어짐 없을 것 (±0.5[mm])

evidence.claim: PB Contact resistance CTQ criteria are GAET PBA < 0.5 ohm and RO PBA < 0.7 ohm.
evidence.evidenceText:
- PB Contact 저항
 · GAET PBA＜ 0.5[Ω], RO PBA ＜ 0.7[Ω]

evidence.claim: Final Test includes X-ray image inspection, defect/driving status, detector performance inspection, and DQE, MTF, NPS.
evidence.evidenceText:
Final Test...- X-ray 영상 검사,"- Defect, 구동 상태
- Detector 성능 검사
- DQE, MTF, NPS 등",CTQ

evidence.claim: Outgoing safety test covers leakage current, withstand voltage, ground resistance, and power input.
evidence.evidenceText: 출하 Safety Test..."- 누설전류, 내전압, 접지저항, 전원입력"
